creator: manu@freebsd.org
text:
We had a talked about this in the last graphics meeting, I need to send a mail to x11@ and current@ saying that x11@ (well me mostly) don't have the time or the need for xorg and that we need new people.
No we won't reset the MAINTAINER, users and commiters are free to send patches (which almost no one did in the past 2-3 years, I think you're one of the few people to actually send patches for some xorg component) and I still have time to review/approve them.
So closing this PR as we won't change MAINTAINER but feel free to open new PRs to update the component that you are interested in.
